attributes.description: Alerts when more than 10 Raft proposals are pending commit (`etcd_server_proposals_pending > 10`). Backlog indicates leader overload or slow disk.
attributes.name: [etcd OTel] Pending proposals backlog

investigation_guide.blob:
## etcd pending proposals backlog

### What fired
`etcd_server_proposals_pending > 10` on a member during the window.

### Why it matters
Pending proposals accumulate when Raft cannot commit them quickly. Usually means slow fsync on the leader, overloaded peer, or excessive write throughput.

### Triage
1. Check leader CPU and disk latency.
2. Look at incoming client write rate.
3. Inspect slow-apply counter for correlated disk pressure.

### Remediation
- Move etcd to faster storage.
- Throttle write-heavy clients.

### Tuning
- `> 10` is a moderate threshold. Tune to your write rate.

esqlQuery.esql:
FROM metrics-etcd.otel-default*
// Gauge: proposals waiting to be committed; backlog indicates leader overload or slow disk
| WHERE etcd_server_proposals_pending IS NOT NULL
  AND etcd_server_proposals_pending > 10
// Adjust threshold (10) based on expected write throughput
| STATS pending = MAX(etcd_server_proposals_pending)
    BY resource.attributes.service.instance.id
| SORT pending DESC
